\documentclass{article}
\ifx\pdfgentounicode\undefined
\else
  \pdfgentounicode=0
\fi
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\title{CID Corrupted PDF Fixture}
\author{Strata Reader Project}
\begin{document}
\maketitle
This is a test of a PDF with disabled or corrupted ToUnicode mappings.
If ToUnicode is not present, standard PDF readers will have difficulty extracting text or copying it, resulting in raw character codes or garbled output (often U+FFFD or wrong characters).
\end{document}
